data.body:
[Coming Soon: World of Warships Collab]

The Abydos Foreclosure Force will soon make their debut in ‘World of Warships’ and ‘World of Warships Legend!’

Check out their official SNS for more details. 

➡️Details: https://x.com/wows_legends![8n0iRVx1zuQY9DpWAJvhgf3xI9iiPrjG.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/8n0iRVx1zuQY9DpWAJvhgf3xI9iiPrjG.jpg)
